message:
feat(extras): add help module with contextual tooltip system

New help module providing contextual help widgets:
- Tooltip widget for displaying help near focused widgets
- TooltipConfig for customizing appearance and behavior
- TooltipPosition enum for tooltip placement
- TooltipState for managing tooltip visibility and animation

Integration:
- Add "help" feature flag to Cargo.toml
- Feature requires: ftui-core, ftui-render, ftui-style, ftui-widgets,
  unicode-segmentation, unicode-width
- Export help module from lib.rs when feature enabled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+//! Contextual help system with tooltips and guided tours.
+//!
+//! This module provides tooltip widgets that integrate with the focus
+//! system to display contextual help near focused widgets.
+
+mod tooltip;
+
+pub use tooltip::{Tooltip, TooltipConfig, TooltipPosition, TooltipState};
